_note: Optional future-compatible property-graph seed for philosophical-midwifery sessions. This is NOT a required v1 step: Phase 1's ../SKILL.md session loop is left unchanged, and the agent need not populate this graph during a v1 session. It exists so Phase v2 (GRPH-01..03: cross-session belief graph, recurrence machinery) can grow into a shape that is already documented here. Only the skeleton schema and ONE worked example are provided; do not treat the example nodes/edges as required runtime output.

node_shape.id: string identifier unique within the graph (beliefs use the belief_N convention)
node_shape.text: string — the belief, proposition, contradiction description, or revised proposition
node_shape.props: optional object of additional fields; belief nodes may carry pathologos_pattern

_schema.pathologos_note: Belief nodes MAY carry an optional props.pathologos_pattern referencing one of the four Phase 1 archetype machine names (see ../references/PATHOLOGOS_PATTERNS.md). It is a hypothesis tag, never a diagnosis. Cross-session recurrence counters, first_seen_session, and provenance are deferred to v2 (GRPH-01..03) and are intentionally absent from this seed.

nodes.text: The value of work depends on recognition.
The user holds that valuable things can go unrecognized, yet felt their own unrecognized work had no value. The two commitments cannot both hold as stated.
Recognition affects visibility and opportunity, but does not determine intrinsic worth.
